nasb.text: But if the bright spot remains in its place and has not spread in the skin, but is dim, it is the swelling from the burn; and the priest shall pronounce him clean, for it is only the scar of the burn.

esv.text: But if the spot remains in one place and does not spread in the skin, but has faded, it is a swelling from the burn, and the priest shall pronounce him clean, for it is the scar of the burn.

cnv.text: 火斑若是在原處止住，沒有在皮上蔓延，只是發暗而已，這是發炎腫瘤，祭司就要宣布他為潔淨，因為這只是發炎的疤痕。

ccb.text: 如果患处没有扩散，颜色变淡，就是烧伤引起的肿包，祭司要宣布他是洁净的，因为那不过是烧伤的疤痕。
